_README: Copy this dir to instances/<your-id>/ and fill in. Then: ./harness/run.sh <your-id> baseline 1
title: one-line description of the bug
tag: vX.Y.Z (or a branch/commit the bug exists at)

ground_truth.fix_summary: one line: what the real fix changed

admission.note: Run baseline first. Admit only if baseline does NOT reliably reach FULL.

provenance: where the bug came from / why it matters / the upstream issue+fix links
